name: Join-Path

options.name: -AdditionalChildPath
options.description: Specifies additional elements to append to the value of the Path parameter. The `ChildPath` parameter is still mandatory and must be specified as well.

options.name: -ChildPath
options.description: Specifies the elements to append to the value of the `Path` parameter. Wildcards are permitted. The `ChildPath` parameter is required, although the parameter name ("ChildPath") is optional.

name: -Path
-PSPath
options.description: Specifies the main path (or paths) to which the child-path is appended. Wildcards are permitted.

options.name: -Resolve
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet should attempt to resolve the joined path from the current provider.

description: Combines a path and a child path into a single path.
